zh.Warkworth Castle, Alnwick, Northumberlan: 英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯
zh.of Thurston, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可瑟斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Drury於1150年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Richard Drury26歲，母親Jane22歲。他於1189年與Matilda de Thurston在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1203年享年54歲。

zh-hans.of Thurston, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可瑟斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Drury于1150年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Richard Drury26岁，母亲Jane22岁。他于1189年与Matilda de Thurston在英国素福爾可瑟斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1203年享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Drury was born in 1150, in England, his father, Sir Richard Drury, was 26 and his mother, Jane, was 22. He married Matilda de Thurston in 1189, in Thurston, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1203, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Drury est né en 1150, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Drury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Thurston en 1189, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1203, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Drury 1150 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Drury 26 und seine Mutter Jane 22. Er hat 1189 in Thurston, Suffolk, England Matilda de Thurston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1203 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Drury è nato il nel 1150 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Drury, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jane, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Thurston nel 1189, nel Thurston, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1203, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Druryが1150年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Druryは26歳，母Janeは22歳であった。1189年にイギリススフォルクスウルストンでMatilda de Thurstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1203年に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Drury(이)가 1150년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Drury(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1189년 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에서 Matilda de Thurston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1203년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Thurston, Suffolk, England: Thurston, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Drury nasceu em 1150, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Drury, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Thurston em 1189, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1203, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Drury родился в 1150 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Drury было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Thurston в 1189 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1203 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Drury nació en 1150, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Drury, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Matilda de Thurston en 1189, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1203, a la edad de 54 años.
